# Spec-Driven Connector Template

Use this template when the onboarding agent or connector owner proposes a new connector.

## requirements.md

Must include business goal, target system, users/personas, allowed tools, denied tools, read/write intent, data classification, auth method, secrets required, approval requirements, audit requirements, observability requirements, and acceptance criteria.

## design.md

Must include connector architecture, MCP tools/resources/prompts, runtime deployment mode, auth/secret handling, gateway interaction, policy enforcement, trace/metric/audit behavior, failure modes, ownership model, and a sequence diagram.

## tasks.md

Must include implementation tasks, test tasks, security review tasks, documentation tasks, registration tasks, deployment tasks, and approval tasks.
